name: Waze
description: Community-based GPS navigation app owned by Google that provides real-time traffic and road condition updates.

years.notes: Original Waze wordmark with pre-rebrand Wazer mascot: speech-bubble character with wheels at front, teal-gray color scheme. Tagline 'OUTSMARTING TRAFFIC, TOGETHER'. Represents the visual identity used from circa 2013 through June 2020.

Pentagram rebrand (June 2020, designer Natasha Jen). New Boing typeface, rounder Wazer mascot with wheels on both sides. Source SVG is monochrome; color version synthesized from official brand palette (#33CCFF cyan from Waze CDN favicon).
